title: Tissa macrotheca
taxonomy:
Tissa macrotheca is a genus of flowering plants in the family Campanulaceae. Tissa macrotheca belongs to the kingdom Plantae and is further classified as follows: 
- Kingdom: Plantae
- Family: Campanulaceae
- Genus: Tissa
- Species: Tissa macrotheca. 
The classification of Tissa macrotheca may not be comprehensive as more research is required to understand the taxonomy of this genus.
